description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Reserve the cheapest small drive-up unit under $80/month near ZIP 94110
tasks.description: Search for storage near ZIP code 94110, filter for small drive-up units, sort by price, and reserve the cheapest option that costs $80/month or less with a move-in date of April 15, 2026.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main location search field in the center of the homepage.
Type "94110" into the location search field and submit the search (using the search button or Enter key).
On the search results page, open the filters panel and select the "Drive-up access" checkbox under Features.
In the size filter section, choose the "Small" category (for example, up to 5x10 units).
Use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High" so that the cheapest units appear first.
From the filtered list, locate the first unit card that shows a monthly rate of $80 or less and click its "Reserve" or "Select" button.
On the reservation page, open the move-in date picker and select "April 15, 2026" as the move-in date.

Fill in the reservation form fields with a name, phone number, and email address, select the "Pay at move-in" or equivalent non-prepaid payment option, and click the final "Complete Reservation" button.

tasks.name: Set the best-rated nearby location as your preferred storage facility
tasks.description: Find locations within 10 miles of ZIP code 10001, sort by rating, and set the highest-rated location with at least 4.5 stars that offers climate-controlled units as your preferred facility.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Locations" or "Find a Location" link in the top navigation.
In the locations search box, type "10001" and submit the search.
On the locations results page, adjust the distance filter to "Within 10 miles" using the distance slider or dropdown.
Use the sort dropdown to choose "Rating: High to Low" so that the best-rated locations appear at the top.
In the locations list, find the first location card that displays a rating of at least 4.5 stars and click on its name or "View details" link.
On that location's page, open the unit filters panel and select the "Climate controlled" checkbox to ensure this location offers climate-controlled units.
On the same location page, click the "Set as preferred location" or similarly labeled button.
If a preferences or confirmation modal appears, click the "Save" or "Confirm" button to store this facility as your preferred location.

tasks.name: Use the size guide to reserve the next larger unit under $150/month for a 1-bedroom apartment
tasks.description: Use the size calculator for a 1-bedroom apartment, choose the next larger recommended unit size, and reserve the cheapest unit of that size with a monthly rate of $150 or less at a location near ZIP 30309.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Size Guide" or "What size do I need?" link in the main navigation.
On the size guide page, in the size calculator section, select "1 bedroom apartment" from the property type or household size options.
In the item checklist, select at least five items such as "Queen mattress", "Sofa", "Dining table", "5 medium boxes", and "TV stand".
Click the "Calculate" or "Get recommendation" button to generate the recommended unit size.

In the list of size options, identify the recommended size and then click on the next larger size option directly above or below it in the list (for example, if 5x10 is recommended, select 5x15 or 10x10, whichever is shown as the next larger).
On the larger size card, click the "View units and prices" or "See availability" button.
On the location selection screen, enter ZIP code "30309" into the location field and submit, then select the first location listed in the results.
On the units list for that size at the chosen location, use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted units, find the first unit with a displayed monthly rate of $150 or less and click its "Reserve" or "Select" button to start the reservation.

tasks.name: Reserve a climate-controlled 10x10+ unit with 'First Month Free' under $180/month
tasks.description: Search for a location in Austin, TX, filter for climate-controlled units that are 10x10 or larger with a 'First Month Free' promotion, and reserve the cheapest option that costs $180/month or less with a move-in date on the 1st of next month.
steps: On the homepage, click the main search bar and type "Austin, TX", then submit the location search.
On the Austin location results page, click on the first location card that shows a "Promotions" or "Deals" badge or label.
On that location's units page, open the "Special Offers" or "Promotions" filter and select the "First Month Free" checkbox or option.
Open the "Unit size" filter and select sizes that are 10x10 and larger (for example, selecting "Medium" and "Large" size categories or explicitly checking 10x10 and bigger sizes).
In the features or amenities filter, check the "Climate controlled" option.
Use the sort dropdown to choose "Price: Low to High" so that the least expensive qualifying units appear first.
From the filtered list, identify the first unit card with a monthly rate of $180 or less and click its "Reserve" or "Select" button.
On the reservation page, open the move-in date picker and select the 1st day of the upcoming month as the move-in date.

Complete the contact information section by entering a name, phone number, and email address, ensure the payment option is set to "Pay at move-in" (or equivalent non-prepaid choice), and click the final "Complete Reservation" button.

tasks.name: Add the lowest-cost $3,000 coverage insurance plan to a new reservation
tasks.description: Start a new reservation at a location near ZIP 60611 and, during the checkout flow, select an insurance plan with about $3,000 coverage, choosing the option with the lowest monthly premium.
steps: From the homepage, enter "60611" into the location search field and submit the search.
On the search results page, click "View units" on the first location in the list.
On the units list, use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High" and then click the "Reserve" or "Select" button for the first unit shown, regardless of size.
Proceed through the reservation steps until you reach the "Add-ons", "Insurance", or "Protection Plan" step of the checkout flow.
In the insurance or protection options section, look for the coverage level closest to $3,000 (for example, an option labeled "$3,000 coverage") and select that coverage tier.
If multiple plans or providers are available for the $3,000 coverage level, compare their displayed monthly premiums and select the plan with the lowest price.
Scroll down and click the "Continue" or "Save and continue" button to move to the next step with the chosen insurance applied to the reservation.
If prompted with an additional confirmation for protection plans, click "Confirm" or "Add coverage" to finalize the selection.

tasks.name: Add specific moving supplies to cart while keeping total under $60
tasks.description: From the moving supplies section, add one medium box bundle (≤$25), one bubble wrap item (≤$10), and one lock (≤$20) to the cart, ensuring the combined total remains under $60.
steps: From any page, click the "Moving Supplies" or "Shop Supplies" link in the top navigation.
On the moving supplies landing page, click the "Boxes" or "Boxes & Packs" category.
In the boxes product list, find a "Medium box bundle" or similar product priced at $25 or less and click on its product title or image.
On the product detail page, set the quantity field to "1" if it is not already, and click the "Add to cart" button.
Use the site navigation or breadcrumb to return to the main "Moving Supplies" page.
Click the "Packing Materials" or "Packing Supplies" category.
In the packing materials list, locate a bubble wrap product priced at $10 or less, click it, leave the quantity at 1, and click "Add to cart".
Return again to the main "Moving Supplies" page and click the "Locks" or "Security" category.

In the locks product list, select a disk or cylinder lock product priced at $20 or less, open its product page, keep quantity at 1, click "Add to cart", and then click the "View cart" or cart icon to open the shopping cart page.

tasks.name: Submit a contact form question about 24-hour vehicle storage access at a specific location
tasks.description: Use the Help/FAQ section to find information about vehicle storage, then access the contact form and send a question about 24-hour access for vehicle storage at the Dallas, TX Main Street location.
steps: From the homepage, scroll to the footer and click the "Help & Support" or "FAQ" link.
On the Help or FAQ page, locate the search field and type "vehicle storage access hours", then submit the search.
In the search results, click on an article whose title includes the phrase "vehicle storage" or similar wording.
Scroll to the bottom of that article and click the "Still need help?", "Contact us", or equivalent contact link or button.
On the contact form page, open the "Topic" or "Reason for contact" dropdown and select the option related to "Access Hours & Security" or the closest available topic.

In the message or question text area, type a question asking whether 24-hour access is available for vehicle storage at the Dallas, TX location on Main Street and whether there are any extra fees for after-hours access.
Fill in the name field with "Jordan Lee" and the email field with "jordan.lee@example.com".
Click the "Send message", "Submit", or similarly labeled button to send the inquiry.

tasks.name: Book an in-person facility tour at the second Seattle location for a specific afternoon time
tasks.description: Find storage locations in Seattle, choose the second result, and schedule an in-person tour on May 10, 2026 at the earliest available time between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM.
steps: On the homepage, enter "Seattle, WA" into the location search field and submit the search.
On the Seattle location results page, identify the second location in the list and click its name or "View details" link.
On that location's detail page, click the "Schedule a tour" or "Book a visit" button.
In the scheduling widget, select "In-person tour" as the visit type if multiple visit types are shown.
Open the calendar control and select the date "May 10, 2026".
In the list of available time slots for that date, look for times between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM and click the earliest available time within that range.
Fill in the required visitor information fields using the name "Alex Morgan", phone number "555-123-4567", and email address "alex.morgan@example.com".
Click the "Confirm tour", "Book appointment", or similarly labeled button to finalize the tour booking.
